scripts.build: bun run gen-version && bun run build:server && bun run build:client
scripts.build:server: bun run build:web && bun run build:broker && bun run build:cli
scripts.build:client: bun run build:wrapper && bun run build:sentinel
scripts.build:cli: bun build src/broker/cli.ts --compile --minify --outfile bin/broker-cli && bun run codesign bin/broker-cli
scripts.build:sentinel: bun build src/sentinel/index.ts --compile --minify --outfile bin/sentinel && bun run codesign bin/sentinel
scripts.build:web: bun run gen-version && cd web && bun run build
scripts.build:web:debug: bun run gen-version && cd web && bun run build:debug
scripts.build:wrapper: bun run gen-version && bun build src/agent-host/index.ts --compile --minify --outfile bin/rclaude && bun run codesign bin/rclaude
scripts.build:wrapper:linux-x64: bun run gen-version && bun build src/agent-host/index.ts --compile --minify --target=bun-linux-x64-baseline --outfile bin/rclaude-linux-x64
scripts.build:sentinel:linux-x64: bun run gen-version && bun build src/sentinel/index.ts --compile --minify --target=bun-linux-x64-baseline --outfile bin/sentinel-linux-x64
scripts.build:wrapper:linux-arm64: bun run gen-version && bun build src/agent-host/index.ts --compile --minify --target=bun-linux-arm64 --outfile bin/rclaude-linux-arm64
scripts.build:sentinel:linux-arm64: bun run gen-version && bun build src/sentinel/index.ts --compile --minify --target=bun-linux-arm64 --outfile bin/sentinel-linux-arm64
scripts.build:linux: bun run build:wrapper:linux-x64 && bun run build:sentinel:linux-x64 && bun run build:wrapper:linux-arm64 && bun run build:sentinel:linux-arm64
scripts.build:packages: bun run gen-version && mkdir -p packages/agent-host/bin packages/sentinel/bin && bun build src/agent-host/index.ts --target=bun --minify --sourcemap=external --outdir packages/agent-host/bin --entry-naming 'rclaude' && bun build src/sentinel/index.ts --target=bun --minify --sourcemap=external --outdir packages/sentinel/bin --entry-naming 'sentinel' && bun run scripts/strip-sourcemap-content.ts packages/agent-host/bin/rclaude.map packages/sentinel/bin/sentinel.map && chmod +x packages/agent-host/bin/rclaude packages/sentinel/bin/sentinel
scripts.deploy: bun run build:web && bun run build:broker && docker compose build --no-cache && docker compose up -d
scripts.deploy:docker: bun run build:web && bun run build:broker && docker compose up -d --build
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit && cd web && bun run typecheck
scripts.install-cli: bun install && cd web && bun install && cd .. && bun run build && mkdir -p ~/.local/bin && ln -sf "$(pwd)/bin/rclaude" ~/.local/bin/rclaude && ln -sf "$(pwd)/bin/broker" ~/.local/bin/broker && ln -sf "$(pwd)/bin/broker-cli" ~/.local/bin/broker-cli && ln -sf "$(pwd)/bin/sentinel" ~/.local/bin/sentinel && ln -sf "$(pwd)/scripts/revive-session.sh" ~/.local/bin/revive-session.sh && echo 'Symlinked rclaude, broker, broker-cli, sentinel, and revive-session.sh to ~/.local/bin'
